ObjectName.value: Chan i Anmana Aftaab Pakav Book

Categories.value: Books|Creative works|Creative works in popular culture|Self-published work

ImageDescription.value:
'Chan-e-Anmaan a Aftaab Pakav' [Together we will make the Sun go our way] is a comprehensive masterpiece of literature. It is a multi-thought book (an interface of science and literature). The contents include Poetry & its critical analysis by experts, essays concerning socio-economic issues, everything about most common health problems (diseases), biographies of legends in science & literature like Albert Einstein, William Shakespeare, Socrates, Plato, Lincoln, Rumi, Jami, Iqbal, Faiz Ahmad Faiz, Sahir Ludhyanvi, Faraz, etc.

It has a detailed chapter on Prophet Muhammad (pbuh) & his family [Khandaan-e-Nabvi], History of Islam, History of Karbala, Chapters on Sufi Saints like Khwaja Gareeb un Nawaz, Mir Syed Ali Hamdani, Shiekh ul Aalam, Syed Meerak Shah (RA), etc & a chapter each about Regional languages in Digital Age, Islam in Fifteenth Century (Hijri) & reconstruction of Muslim thought. The opinion of 20 experts of international reputation is presented in the beginning. There are 150 diagrams/figures/maps and medical illustrations. Moreover, the book has more than 300 historical pictures at the end.

The book is an encyclopaedia in a regional language - first of its kind.
